description:
Chongqing East is unlike any other train station on the planet.
Attio is the AI CRM of the future. To try it yourself, and ask more from your CRM, go to 👉  https://attio.com/b1m

🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/why-china-built-a-train-station-as-big-as-a-city

This video contains paid promotion for Attio.

00:00 Introducing Chongqing East Station
01:19 China's infrastructure mission
04:55 Why Chongqing?
10:09 Chongqing East Station is huge
12:10 Building a giant
15:01 Can the records continue to fall?

Additional footage and images: Special thanks to Alex from Reporterfy and iChongqing, WCICO, VDE 8, Tomio344456, Daniel Dumbrill, Marc Curtis, Site Engine, 耀明 钟, Terry’s WanderLens, René, LayGTraveller, theslowlane, China News Service, FOX59 News, Glabb, Think Pods.

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

We're raising awareness of construction's mental health crisis through our Get Construction Talking initiative. There’s a video series on our channel and you can find support or donate at - https://www.getconstructiontalking.org/
